news.title: Gamers seemingly reject AMD's latest Radeon GPU offering despite sub-$600 price
news.description: It appears gamers have not been too enthusiastic about the Radeon RX 9070 GRE, the newest Radeon GPU launch. The Radeon RX 9070 GRE launched at the same MSRP as the RX 9070 despite being noticeably weaker with less VRAM.
